name: origin_gate_reconciliation
description: Verifies that an object described by the narrator as player-held (Turn 1) is blocked by the origin gate, and when the same object is later described as grounded on a localspace floor (Turn 2), it is promoted with reconciliation_count > 0. Player starts inside a localspace at L2 depth for cache matching on container_id.
world_prompt: You are in a small stone chamber. The room has rough stone walls, a packed dirt floor, and a single wooden table in the center. A lantern sits on the table. You are standing near the table.

turns.action: I reach for the lantern on the table, my fingers brushing its cool metal base.
I examine the lantern on the table. It is a simple iron lantern with a glass chimney, sitting on the wooden table.
